column1: invariant,"Machine learning models can be fine-tuned on domain-specific data. The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog. Water boils at one hundred degrees Celsius at sea level. The Earth orbits the Sun once every three hundred and sixty-five days. Photosynthesis converts sunlight into chemical energy in plants. The speed of light in a vacuum is approximately three hundred thousand kilometers per second. DNA carries the genetic instructions for all known living organisms. Gravity pulls objects toward the center of mass of larger bodies. The periodic table organizes chemical elements by atomic number. Sound travels faster through water than through air. An algorithm is a step-by-step procedure for solving a problem. The mitochondria generate most of the cell's supply of energy. Tectonic plates shift and collide beneath the surface of the Earth. Binary code represents data using sequences of ones and zeros. Atoms consist of protons and neutrons in a nucleus surrounded by electrons. Ocean currents distribute heat energy around the globe. A triangle's interior angles always sum to one hundred and eighty degrees."
